'''Olanet''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Siskeen system/Legends|Siskeen system]] that sided with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was said to be home to the second largest [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Olanet droid factory|factory]] since [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. One of the most important sectors of the economy was the [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]]-meat industry.
